channel.title: MindExtract
channel.description: MindExtract — download and transcribe video from anywhere

item.title: Version 1.5.13
item.description:
What's New in 1.5.13

  • Fixed auto-update — Resolved issue where Sparkle kept offering the same version as an update
  • Reliable model downloads — Downloading a model in Settings now always works for transcription immediately after
  • Better no-model experience — If you try to transcribe without a model, you'll see a clear prompt to download one instead of a generic error
